reasoning_model_1:

model_comparison: In comparing the two models on the dimension of **语速 (Speed)**, Model 1 (T1) is the clear winner. T1 adheres strictly to the "extremely fast" constraint by delivering the lines rapidly, minimizing pauses, and creating a sense of urgency. Model 2 (T2), conversely, delivers the text at a normal, comfortable speaking rate with distinct pauses, completely missing the "extremely fast" requirement. T1 demonstrates superior control over the speaking rate feature.
